Create and manage calendars, events, and: Create and manage calendars, events, and RSVPs with AddEvent — the add-to-calendar service.
\n**Authenticate with your AddEvent API:
**Authenticate with your AddEvent API key.**

1. Sign in to your AddEvent account at https://dashboard.addevent.com.
2. Open **Account → Settings** (https://dashboard.addevent.com/account/settings).
3. Copy your **API key** and paste it below.

Note: API access requires a paid AddEvent plan — the free Hobby plan does not support the API.
Create Dynamic Add to Calendar Links: Create Dynamic Add to Calendar Links
Creates a new event on your AddEvent cal: Creates a new event on your AddEvent calendar.
Updates an event on your AddEvent calend: Updates an event on your AddEvent calendar. Only the fields you fill in are changed.
Deletes an event on your AddEvent calend: Deletes an event on your AddEvent calendar.
Finds events matching a search term. Ret: Finds events matching a search term. Returns up to 20 of the best matches.
Searches for an event by a term. If no m: Searches for an event by a term. If no match is found, creates a new event with the details below.
Creates a new RSVP attendee on your AddE: Creates a new RSVP attendee on your AddEvent event.
Deletes a subscriber from your AddEvent: Deletes a subscriber from your AddEvent calendar.
Creates an AddEvent event and returns it: Creates an AddEvent event and returns its shareable "Add to Calendar" links. Opening a link lets recipients add the event to Apple, Google, Outlook, and other calendars. Each run produces a unique link, so links can be personalized per recipient.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
Title: 标题
Name: 名称
Format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss' (24-hour),: Format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss' (24-hour), interpreted in the event's timezone. Example: 2025-06-15 14:30:00. A date alone (YYYY-MM-DD) is also accepted.
Same format as the start. Defaults to on: Same format as the start. Defaults to one hour after the start.
The event's timezone. Defaults to the ca: The event's timezone. Defaults to the calendar's timezone if left blank.
Plain text or HTML (around 500 character: Plain text or HTML (around 500 characters recommended).
A physical address or a URL. Leave blank: A physical address or a URL. Leave blank if you set a saved Location ID instead.
The ID of a saved location in AddEvent. Use this instead of Location.
Required if you set an organizer email.
Required if you set an organizer name.
Minutes before the event to remind atten: Minutes before the event to remind attendees (0–10800).
How the event appears in attendees' cale: How the event appears in attendees' calendars.
An iCalendar RRULE, e.g. FREQ=WEEKLY;BYD: An iCalendar RRULE, e.g. FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO. Leave blank for a one-time event.
A private label for your reference; not: A private label for your reference; not shown to attendees.
A custom landing page template ID, or 'd: A custom landing page template ID, or 'default'.
A custom RSVP form ID, or 'default'. Onl: A custom RSVP form ID, or 'default'. Only used when RSVP is enabled.
Start typing to search your events by ti: Start typing to search your events by title.
Leave blank to keep the current value.
Searches the title, internal name, descr: Searches the title, internal name, description, and location of your events.
Only return events starting on or after: Only return events starting on or after this time. Format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss' or 'YYYY-MM-DD'.
Only return events starting on or before: Only return events starting on or before this time. Format: 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss' or 'YYYY-MM-DD'.
Searches the title, internal name, descr: Searches the title, internal name, description, and location of your events. The first match is returned.
The attendee's email address. Event upda: The attendee's email address. Event updates and reminders are sent here.
The attendee's name (required by the def: The attendee's name (required by the default RSVP form).
Send a confirmation email to the attende: Send a confirmation email to the attendee and a notification to the organizer.
Extra RSVP form values for custom forms,: Extra RSVP form values for custom forms, as key-value pairs. The name is set by the Name field above.
Pick a calendar above to narrow this lis: Pick a calendar above to narrow this list.
The event title shown in the calendar.
A physical address or a URL.

Triggers when a new subscriber is added: Triggers when a new subscriber is added to your AddEvent calendar. Leave the calendar blank to watch all of them.
Triggers when a new attendee RSVPs to yo: Triggers when a new attendee RSVPs to your AddEvent event.
